name: Raghunath Temple
description: One of the largest temple complexes in North India, comprising seven distinct shrines, all crowned with gold-plated spires. It is dedicated to Lord Rama.
history: Construction was started by Maharaja Gulab Singh in 1835 and completed by his son Maharaja Ranbir Singh in 1860.
famousFor: Gold-plated spires, 12 lakh Saligram stones, deep historical roots.
